records.title: Best Tonneau Covers for Ford F-150
records.compatibilityNote: Buyer guide focused on F-150 bed-cover types, security, and install tradeoffs.
buyerNotes: Soft roll-up covers start around $200 and prioritize budget plus full bed access.
Hard folding and hard rolling styles trade higher price for security and weather resistance.

records.title: The Best F-150 Running Boards
records.compatibilityNote: F-150 running-board guide with brand examples and category breakdowns.
buyerNotes: Running boards help cab access and reduce dirt transfer into the cabin.
Power steps add convenience but raise cost and complexity versus fixed boards.

records.title: Best-Selling Ford F-150 Accessories
records.compatibilityNote: Sales-driven guide highlighting the most common F-150 accessory families.
buyerNotes: Recurring top sellers include tonneau covers, running boards, bed liners, and wheel/tire packages.
Popular categories are useful signals for owner priorities, not proof of necessity.
